privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Blender scene with a procedurally-generated 'SciFiCrate' object. Expected outputs are saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/wear_mask.png (texture paint image) and /home/ga/BlenderProjects/distressed_crate.blend (Blender project). The object name is 'SciFiCrate'. The pixel ratio constraints (min_painted_pixels_ratio: 0.005, max_painted_pixels_ratio: 0.95) are declared in metadata but not validated by the verifier or export scripts; actual validation only checks for image content presence and material node configuration.
